title: Cylinder
description: Cylinder: A solid circular right angled cylinder.

Radius.description: Distance from the Axis to the Cylinder boundary surface. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Height.description: Distance between the base and top surface, measured along the Axis. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

_t.description: Optional Type descriminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
